title: agrostis glabra var. melanthes
intro: Agrostis glabra var. melanthes, also known as Black Bentgrass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Black Bentgrass include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Black Bentgrass is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
